name: revit_create_and_print_sheet_for_element
description: Creates a sheet with right, front, top, and isometric 3D views for a single selected element, exports PDF and JPG, and optionally commits the transaction to save the sheet.

element_id.description: Element to document; when omitted, prompts for interactive pick

save_sheet.description: Whether to commit the transaction and keep the sheet (default prompts user)

output_directory.description: Directory for PDF and image export (default C:/tmp)

title_block_name.description: Title block family symbol name (default 'AIR CRO - Plano DIN A4')

notes: FabricationPart elements use duct LCS for view orientation. Requires title block in project. Uses DialogBoxShowing to auto-accept temporary hide/isolate export prompt.
